name: TOP_ASSIGNEES_BY_PATHWAY_PATENT_COUNT
description: Top assignees by pathway patent count. Auto-generated from the core-four benchmark and aligned to the validated query-frame Cypher semantics.
cypher:
MATCH (pw:Pathway {name: $pathway})<-[:IN_PATHWAY]-(t:Target)<-[:HAS_TARGET]-(tp:TargetPair)<-[:HAS_TARGET_PAIR]-(p:Patent)-[:HAS_ASSIGNEE]->(a:Assignee)
RETURN a.name AS assignee, count(DISTINCT p) AS patent_count
ORDER BY patent_count DESC, assignee
LIMIT 10

examples: Within target-pair combinations related to the Intra-Golgi and retrograde Golgi-to-ER traffic pathway, which companies filed the most patents? Please provide the top 10.
Within target-pair combinations related to the Sialic acid metabolism pathway, which companies filed the most patents? Please provide the top 10.
Within target-pair combinations related to the Amyloid fiber formation pathway, which companies filed the most patents? Please provide the top 10.
